faqs.question: Why are stink bugs so common in Jamaica, Queens?
faqs.answer: Jamaica's mix of older residential buildings, tree-lined streets, and proximity to green spaces like Baisley Pond Park creates ideal conditions for stink bugs seeking shelter, especially during seasonal changes when they enter homes through small cracks and gaps.
